mapper.sql: ps.scheme_id, ps.scheme_code, ps.scheme_name, ps.scheme_type, ps.plan_year, ps.lead_dept_id, ps.lead_dept_name, ps.leader_id, ps.leader_name, ps.total_amount, ps.scheme_status, ps.version_no, ps.process_instance_id, ps.attachments, ps.del_flag, ps.create_by, ps.create_time, ps.update_by, ps.update_time, ps.remark
mapper.select: SELECT , pst.tag_id, pst.tag_name, pst.tag_color, pst.order_num, pst.status AS tag_status FROM plan_scheme ps LEFT JOIN plan_scheme_tag_rel pstr ON ps.scheme_id = pstr.scheme_id LEFT JOIN plan_scheme_tag pst ON pstr.tag_id = pst.tag_id WHERE ps.scheme_id = #{schemeId} AND ps.del_flag = '0'
mapper.update:
UPDATE plan_scheme
scheme_code = #{schemeCode}, scheme_name = #{schemeName}, scheme_type = #{schemeType}, plan_year = #{planYear}, lead_dept_id = #{leadDeptId}, lead_dept_name = #{leadDeptName}, leader_id = #{leaderId}, leader_name = #{leaderName}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, scheme_status = #{schemeStatus}, version_no = #{versionNo}, process_instance_id = #{processInstanceId}, attachments = #{attachments}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE scheme_id = #{schemeId} AND del_flag = '0'

UPDATE plan_scheme SET scheme_status = #{schemeStatus}, process_instance_id = #{processInstanceId}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE scheme_id = #{schemeId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete: UPDATE plan_scheme SET del_flag = '2' WHERE scheme_id = #{schemeId}

UPDATE plan_scheme SET del_flag = '2' WHERE scheme_id IN
#{schemeId}
